body_txt: The ultimate way to introduce Parental Issues short of a murder plot. Your dad is revealed to have been hiding a life with a whole other family. In fact, if he's sneaky enough, from that family's perspective, yours might be the Secret Other Family. The secret family might eventually be folded into the main one if the legal spouse dies and the other decides to get Remarried to the Mistress . May have started after a little Hanky-Panky with the Help . An occupation that requires one to travel (travelling salesman, ship's officer, pilot, etc.) is a great help in pulling this off, making this trope overlap with A Girl in Every Port . Sub-Trope of Living a Double Life . Compare Polygamy , where it's done openly and the families know about each other.
